description: Out of the box dashboard for Azure CDN Profile.
title: Azure CDN Profile Overview

a1b2c3d4-0001-4000-8000-000000000001.description: Subscription ID for your Azure Account
a1b2c3d4-0001-4000-8000-000000000001.name: azuremonitor.subscription_id

widgets.description: The time calculated from when the client request was received by the HTTP/S proxy until the client acknowledged the last response byte from the HTTP/S proxy.

filter.expression: azuremonitor.subscription_id = $azuremonitor.subscription_id AND resource_group = $resource_group AND name IN $cdnprofile  AND type = 'Microsoft.Cdn/profiles'

widgets.title: Total Latency

widgets.description: The time calculated from when the request was sent by AFDX edge to the backend until AFDX received the last response byte from the backend.

filter.expression: azuremonitor.subscription_id = $azuremonitor.subscription_id AND resource_group = $resource_group AND name IN $cdnprofile  AND type = 'Microsoft.Cdn/profiles'

widgets.title: Origin Latency

widgets.description: The average time taken by a WebSocket connection.

filter.expression: azuremonitor.subscription_id = $azuremonitor.subscription_id AND resource_group = $resource_group AND name IN $cdnprofile  AND type = 'Microsoft.Cdn/profiles'

widgets.title: Avg WebSocket Connection Duration

widgets.description: The percentage of successful health probes from AFDX to backends.

filter.expression: azuremonitor.subscription_id = $azuremonitor.subscription_id AND resource_group = $resource_group AND name IN $cdnprofile  AND type = 'Microsoft.Cdn/profiles'

widgets.title: Origin Health Percentage

widgets.description: The ratio of the total bytes served from the cache compared to the total response bytes.

filter.expression: azuremonitor.subscription_id = $azuremonitor.subscription_id AND resource_group = $resource_group AND name IN $cdnprofile  AND type = 'Microsoft.Cdn/profiles'

widgets.title: Byte Hit Ratio

widgets.description: The percentage of all client requests for which the response status code is 4XX.

filter.expression: azuremonitor.subscription_id = $azuremonitor.subscription_id AND resource_group = $resource_group AND name IN $cdnprofile  AND type = 'Microsoft.Cdn/profiles'

widgets.title: 4XX Error Rate

widgets.description: The percentage of all client requests for which the response status code is 5XX.

filter.expression: azuremonitor.subscription_id = $azuremonitor.subscription_id AND resource_group = $resource_group AND name IN $cdnprofile  AND type = 'Microsoft.Cdn/profiles'

widgets.title: 5XX Error Rate

widgets.description: The number of client requests served by the HTTP/S proxy.

filter.expression: azuremonitor.subscription_id = $azuremonitor.subscription_id AND resource_group = $resource_group AND name IN $cdnprofile  AND type = 'Microsoft.Cdn/profiles'

widgets.title: Request Count

widgets.description: The number of requests sent from AFDX to origin.

filter.expression: azuremonitor.subscription_id = $azuremonitor.subscription_id AND resource_group = $resource_group AND name IN $cdnprofile  AND type = 'Microsoft.Cdn/profiles'

widgets.title: Origin Request Count

widgets.description: The number of bytes sent as requests from clients to AFDX.

filter.expression: azuremonitor.subscription_id = $azuremonitor.subscription_id AND resource_group = $resource_group AND name IN $cdnprofile  AND type = 'Microsoft.Cdn/profiles'

widgets.title: Request Size

widgets.description: The number of bytes sent as responses from HTTP/S proxy to clients.

filter.expression: azuremonitor.subscription_id = $azuremonitor.subscription_id AND resource_group = $resource_group AND name IN $cdnprofile  AND type = 'Microsoft.Cdn/profiles'

widgets.title: Response Size

widgets.description: The number of active WebSocket connections.

filter.expression: azuremonitor.subscription_id = $azuremonitor.subscription_id AND resource_group = $resource_group AND name IN $cdnprofile  AND type = 'Microsoft.Cdn/profiles'

widgets.title: Active WebSocket Connections

widgets.description: The number of WebSocket connections requested.

filter.expression: azuremonitor.subscription_id = $azuremonitor.subscription_id AND resource_group = $resource_group AND name IN $cdnprofile  AND type = 'Microsoft.Cdn/profiles'

widgets.title: WebSocket Connections

widgets.description: The number of client requests processed by the Web Application Firewall.

filter.expression: azuremonitor.subscription_id = $azuremonitor.subscription_id AND resource_group = $resource_group AND name IN $cdnprofile  AND type = 'Microsoft.Cdn/profiles'

widgets.title: WAF Request Count

widgets.description: The number of CAPTCHA requests evaluated by the Web Application Firewall.

filter.expression: azuremonitor.subscription_id = $azuremonitor.subscription_id AND resource_group = $resource_group AND name IN $cdnprofile  AND type = 'Microsoft.Cdn/profiles'

widgets.title: WAF CAPTCHA Request Count

widgets.description: The number of JS challenge requests evaluated by the Web Application Firewall.

filter.expression: azuremonitor.subscription_id = $azuremonitor.subscription_id AND resource_group = $resource_group AND name IN $cdnprofile  AND type = 'Microsoft.Cdn/profiles'

widgets.title: WAF JS Challenge Request Count
